name: Sam (FROM Look Outside, not ME)
description:
~You...okay?~

User looked at The Visitor, Sam finds them as it's result.

Oh BOY The Visitor game makes my braincase happy! Nothing else to say, low token count being because Sam is a blank slate for the pc. I hope y'all have fun regardless....Or don't, I'm not your parent. Also you don't HAVE to be a monstrosity! Boring ass human <3

I think the image is from SkeleMun. I'd hunt down all the other artists pictures used on my many other bots but that requires fortitude. And brain ain't.

Tags: Sam, Look Outside, Eldritch User.
creator: Incubus Sam
